texto: The world just goes along. Nothing much matters, you know? I mean really matters. but then sometimes, just for a second, you get this grace, this belief that it does matter, a whole lot.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lucia Berlin que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “The world just goes along. Nothing much matters, you know? I mean really matters. but then someti…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, grace, matters, com foco em reflexao.

texto: It has been seven years since you died. Of course what I'll say next is that time has flown by. I got old. All of a sudden, de repente. I walk with difficulty. I even drool. I leave the door unlocked in case I die in my sleep, but it's more likely I'll go endlessly on until I get put away someplace. I am already dotty.... It's not so strange that I talk to my cat but I feel silly because he is totally deaf.

texto: Anytime you think you hate somebody, what you do is pray for them. Try it, you’ll see.
